Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major urban center in Nigeria, known for its rapid development and economic growth. It is one of the fastest-growing cities in the country, with a population that has increased significantly over the years. The city is home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Federal University of Technology, Lagos. Lekki is also a hub for business and industry, attracting investments from both domestic and international sources.
